message:
feat(core): add disk-pressure feature gate with nix dependency

Adds the "disk-pressure" feature flag to frankenterm-core that enables
the nix crate (with fs feature) for statvfs-based filesystem free space
queries. This feature-gates the disk_pressure module's Unix-native
path, allowing builds without nix when disk pressure monitoring is
not needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
